designSystem.style: Dark earthy organic — deep forest-green background with warm olive primary accents, amber urgency indicators, and muted sage typography. Clean card-based layout with colored left-border recipe urgency indicators and glowing status highlights.

screens: Pantry — ingredient inventory grouped by urgency (Use Now / Use Soon / Well Stocked) with rescue alert banner and expiry badges
Scan — receipt/label camera scanner with multi-stage flow: choose input → camera viewfinder → detected items review → confirm add to pantry
Recipes — ranked recipe cards with match percentage, rescue notes, urgency color-coding, and full detail modal with step-by-step cook mode
Leftover Lore — leftover transformation tracker showing multi-meal chains (e.g. roast chicken → tacos → soup → sandwich) with savings stats
